caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing winds of 17 kt with wave heights reaching 3.8 ft, while Curacao is seeing winds of 16 kt. I expect the high rain probability of 88% to have the most significant impact on these ports, particularly St. Thomas in the Eastern Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Remain Moderate
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing moderate winds of 19 kt with wave heights reaching 3.6 ft, while Istanbul has lighter conditions with winds at 14 kt. I expect these conditions to prevail with a 28% chance of rain in Cadiz, making for a relatively calm day in the Mediterranean ports.
